allow: PowerShell(Get-Command npm, npx, corepack, node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(try { $r1 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "HOME: $\($r1.StatusCode\)" } catch { "HOME ERR: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/creator/earn" -TimeoutSec 60 -UseBasicParsing; "EARN: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { "EARN ERR: $_" })

PowerShell($dirs = @\("framer-motion","gsap","webgl-fluid-enhanced","@openreplay","libphonenumber-js","lucide-react","react-phone-number-input","embla-carousel-react","i18next","react-i18next","@tanstack/react-form"\); foreach \($d in $dirs\) { $p = "node_modules/$d"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem -Recurse $p -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; "{0,-32} {1,10:N1} MB" -f $d, \($size/1MB\) } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs" | Where-Object {$_.Name -match 'yarn|npm|pnpm|corepack'} | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\HP\\AppData\\Roaming\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell("--- Totals by top-level dir in .next/static ---"; Get-ChildItem .next/static -Directory | ForEach-Object { $dir = $_; $sum = \(Get-ChildItem $dir -Recurse -File | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; "{0,8:N2} MB  {1}" -f \($sum/1MB\), $dir.Name }; "`n--- Top 15 largest assets total in .next \(any type\) ---"; Get-ChildItem .next -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 | ForEach-Object { "{0,8:N0} KB  {1}" -f \($_.Length/1KB\), \($_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\(\(Resolve-Path .next\).Path\),''\) })
PowerShell(npx eslint components/blog/RelatedPosts.tsx components/blog/BlogHeader.tsx app/root-layout-client.tsx app/blogs/layout.tsx 2>&1)

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/psi.json'\)\); print\('score:', d['lighthouseResult']['categories']['performance']['score']\); audits=d['lighthouseResult']['audits']; [print\(f\\"{k}: score={v.get\('score'\)} display={v.get\('displayValue',''\)}\\"\) for k,v in audits.items\(\) if v.get\('score'\) is not None and v.get\('score'\) != 1 and v.get\('score'\) != None]")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./psi-mobile.json'\); if\(d.error\){console.log\('ERROR',JSON.stringify\(d.error\)\);process.exit\(1\)} const a=d.lighthouseResult.audits; console.log\('score:',d.lighthouseResult.categories.performance.score\); ['largest-contentful-paint','first-contentful-paint','total-blocking-time','cumulative-layout-shift','speed-index','server-response-time','interactive'].forEach\(k=>console.log\(k, a[k]&&a[k].displayValue, 'score=',a[k]&&a[k].score\)\); console.log\('--- FAILING/OPPORTUNITY ---'\); Object.entries\(a\).forEach\(\([k,v]\)=>{ if\(v.score!==null && v.score<0.9 && v.score!==undefined\){ console.log\(k,'|score',v.score,'|',v.displayValue||v.title\) } }\);")

Bash(npx --no-install eslint components/Footer.tsx components/HeroSection.tsx components/creator/earn/HeroSection.tsx app/creator/earn/CreatorEarnPage.tsx lib/hooks/useIsPromoActive.tsx lib/promo/config.ts components/promo/PromoCelebration.tsx)
